title: Russian Culture (mcreate cringe mod)
body: In this mod you will study Russian culture in this mod there is a lot of interesting food and new game mechanics when you put on armor you get an effect depending on the part of the armor you put on the mod also adds functionality to the polar bear from which fur now drops from which new insulated armor is crafted if you got bored of the biomes of minecraft then I also added a new fir biome to diversify the game world in the mod a new tree, interesting achievements and new cultures tea and raspberries from which interesting food is crafted that can give effects in the mod there is still a lot of interesting things I advise you to download it to find out everything
